text: This review is specifically for Linda.  As a loyal Coach customer, I was highly disappointed in how I was treated by a manager. Not only did she lack the skill to manage, she abandoned her duties when tasked to address issues within her job description.  I have been a consumer of Coach since the 1990s.  Over the years, I have seen product quality and policies change, but customer service has stayed consistently good.  Never had I been so disrespected as I had been on January 6, 2026 by Linda.  Coach, it is shameful that when a customer has several defective items, that they be abandoned the counter in the middle of a transaction, without any explanation.  At a time when I can truly spend my money where I am appreciate and respected, blatant disregard and poor product quality is not the way to retain your Base Buyer and Target Market.  It needs to be remembered that to buy from Coach is a choice, not a necessity.  Coach may loose a loyal customer over a terrible manager and a replacement chain.
address: 800 GA-400 Spc 920, Dawsonville, GA 30534

text: I recently visited the store..the new store manager was wonderful and super helpful with her recommendations and suggestions and post sales service ..however, her superior ..woman with curly hair..resembles character professor Sybill trelawney, from Harry Potter , has no interest to serve customers post sales.. I recently bought a black tabby (on Friday) from 5th ave nyc, I was so excited that i was making a purchase from a store on 5the ave and trusted that the items from the back/ store warehouse is always in best condition..however, when I opened the bag at home I instantly saw a dent..it broke my heart.. for me it’s an expensive purchase with plenty of savings and thought. And it’s clearly visible.. The super manager behaved as though she couldn’t see the dent at all and kept telling me settle as if it’s nothing. I leave for my home tomorrow morning and instead of spending my time with family I will be heading to the 5the ave store in the hopes for resolution. Lesson learnt- 1) always check item in store and 2) I m not sure this kind of indulgence that comes with this big of a concern is worthwhile 3) Stay away from lady who resembles prof sybill..  Update- the nyc 5th ave store was helpful and sorted all my issues..thank you!!

text: I recently purchased the Signature Silk Diamond Scarf from Coach and absolutely love it. The quality is beautiful, the silk feels luxurious, and it’s the perfect accessory for my purse.  What made the experience exceptional was the outstanding customer service I received from Belen at the Potomac Mills Coach store. I came in looking for a scarf to accessorize my purse, and she went above and beyond to help me. Belen patiently pulled several scarves for me to consider and even took the time to style them on my purse so I could see how each one looked. Her eye for style, attention to detail, and willingness to help made all the difference.  She was friendly, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in helping me find the perfect match. Thanks to her expertise, I left with a scarf I absolutely love and a wonderful shopping experience. Thank you, Belen, for your exceptional service!
address: 2700 Potomac Mills Cir Spc 953, Woodbridge, VA 22192
